title: Stay on top of your tasks
detail: Organize your daily tasks in one place and never miss what matters. Keep track of everything with a simple and clean workspace.

title: Tap smart, manage faster
detail: Tap the round button to select tasks for completing or deleting. Tap the task itself to quickly edit its content.

title: Create tasks in seconds
detail: Tap the + button to add a new task. Write your plan, confirm it, and keep your to-do list up to date.
